name: HappyCake Growth OS
pitch: AI agents turn Sugar Land moments into HappyCake orders, repeat customers, and measurable $40k/month growth.

production.claudeCodeCliProof: local Express wrapper in src/server/assistant.ts shells to claude -p; deployed Vercel assistant currently proves live MCP and owner-safety semantics

runtime.localFallback: deterministic simulator for credential-free local clone

verticalSlice: Local Campaign → Instagram/WhatsApp Lead → AI Sales → Owner Telegram Approval → POS/Kitchen Handoff → Evidence Log
guardrails: No invented prices, availability, hours, allergens, or delivery promises
Paid posts/ads require Telegram owner approval
